chats.summary: This chat demonstrates severe technical or procedural failures. The agent sent closing statements before any greeting, repeated the same canned responses multiple times, and completely ignored customer frustration. The conversation appears to be either a system glitch or an agent who lost control of the chat flow, resulting in a confusing and unhelpful customer experience.
strengths: Provided detailed step-by-step email instructions
Included correct escalation email address and subject line format
weaknesses: Sent closing/farewell messages at the start of conversation
Repeated identical canned responses multiple times
Ignored customer frustration ('Yalll say the same')
Never discovered or addressed the actual underlying issue
No proper greeting or conversation structure
Abandoned customer without resolution
chats.coaching_tip: Before sending ANY message, read the full conversation context and ensure you're responding in logical order. A chat must flow: Greeting → Discovery → Resolution → Closing. Never send closing statements before understanding the customer's issue, and always acknowledge customer frustration before proceeding.
